content.text:
{
  "dimension": "effectiveness-depth",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The client starts in clean externalization ('They don't see me' / 'it's very clear they don't know how I tick') and ends having reversed the mirror onto herself multiple times. By turn 13 she catches the projection ('I want to be seen... I'm still wanting that one kind of attention I've decided I didn't get'), by turn 15 she names 'It's wrapped up in my wanting,' by turn 34-35 she concedes 'they are seeing me,' and by turn 37-39 she lands on a new framing entirely: 'What they're not seeing is I don't need you to affirm me... I just want it... It's creating a power dynamic that I reject.' The final turns shift the conversation from a being-seen complaint to an empowerment question ('It's not very empowering, but I really want it' — turn 43), which is the territory the profile names (empowered-vs-power). This is real movement in the client's language, not coach-inferred. The breakthrough condition (refusal to validate the surface complaint produces structural insight) is met visibly in client turns.",
  "evidence_turns": [3, 9, 13, 15, 27, 35, 37, 39, 43],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Starting state: pure externalization, 'They don't see me.'"},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "First crack — client owns the judgment: 'it would mean I'm judging the shit out of them. I do think that's true.'"},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Mirror lands: 'Oh, interesting. I want to be seen... I'm still wanting that one kind of attention I've decided I didn't get.' Client traverses the projection."},
    {"turn": 15, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client names her own version of the very thing she judged in her father: 'It's wrapped up in my wanting.'"},
    {"turn": 17, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Client jokes/defends ('I'm a better person than that') — partial resistance, but with self-awareness."},
    {"turn": 27, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Client acknowledges the logic but resists the felt experience: 'The logic is... I don't feel it. I don't want to feel that.' Partial — intellect ahead of soma."},
    {"turn": 29, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Concedes 'Nothing is 100%' — the impossibility of the criteria begins to land."},
    {"turn": 33, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Admits 'Right now, no, I definitely want to be in charge' — directly contradicts her opening story."},
    {"turn": 35, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Big concession: 'that's true, they are seeing me' — and then reframes the actual grievance to power dynamics."},
    {"turn": 37, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "New language emerges: 'I don't need you to affirm me' — a stance she could not have articulated at turn 1."},
    {"turn": 39, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client takes Joe's 'I just want it' and runs with it, naming the rejected power dynamic herself."},
    {"turn": 43, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Final landing: 'It's not very empowering, but I really want it.' Honest, simpler, and on the empowerment layer rather than the being-seen layer."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["in-the-story-im-not-being-seen", "mirror-the-judgment", "follow-wonder-flag-the-deflection", "i-dont-buy-your-story", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "what-if-they-did-see-you", "how-is-that-not-true-about-you", "empowered-vs-power", "fault-vs-responsibility", "judgment-vs-discernment"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["container-of-love", "comparative-mind"],
  "notes": "Shift is visible specifically in the client's reversals: 'they don't see me' (T3) → 'they are seeing me' (T35) → 'I don't need you to affirm me, I just want it' (T37-39). That arc is the breakthrough."
}
